results.title: Reijnders dropped by the Dutch while Morocco make four changes
Blue Jays OF Addison Barger shut down because of back injury, further delaying return
results.description: TORONTO (AP) — Toronto Blue Jays outfielder Addison Barger will be shut down for several more weeks because of a stress reaction in his back, further delaying his return in an injury-plagued season.

results.title: Ex-NFL star Chris Johnson reveals ALS diagnosis: 'You can give up, or you can fight. I chose to fight'
results.description: LOS ANGELES — Chris Johnson, the former NFL running back who holds the record for most yards from scrimmage in a single season, has the degenerative neurological disorder amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, commonly known as ALS or Lou Gehrig's disease.

results.title: Kawhi Leonard trade talks heat up as Clippers salary-cap circumvention findings loom
results.description: LOS ANGELES — Reasons for the Clippers to trade Kawhi Leonard are apparent. So are reasons to keep the seven-time All-Pro forward who turned 35 on Monday.
